member.name: M:HSMServer.Authentication.IUserManager.AddUser(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.Guid,HSMServer.Model.Authentication.ProductRoleEnum}})
member.summary: Add new user with the specified parameters
member.param: Login of the new user, must be unique and not empty

member.name: M:HSMServer.Authentication.IUserManager.UpdateUser(HSMServer.Model.Authentication.User)
member.summary: New user object
member.param: User object (password field must be password hash).

member.name: T:HSMServer.Controllers.AgentController
member.summary:
Per-product HSM Agent download (epic #1167, W6/W7). The admin opens a product, clicks "Download Windows agent", and gets a zip with the byte-identical signed exe + a generated config.json (this server's address + the product's access key) + silent install scripts. The server ONLY generates + serves the zip — it is not an installer; the client install is the C++ exe's own --install (no .NET/MSI on the client).
Epic #1174 adds two unauthenticated / key-authenticated endpoints for the agent self-update channel: GET /api/agent/version (version manifest) and GET /api/agent/exe (binary download, Key-header auth).

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.AgentController.GetVersion
member.summary: Agent self-update manifest (epic #1174). Returns the version, SHA-256, and whether the server permits auto-updates. No authentication — version info is not sensitive and agents need to poll this before they have a user context. Returns 503 when no exe is staged.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.AgentController.GetExe
member.summary: Serve the staged agent binary for self-update (epic #1174). Requires a valid product access key in the Key request header — the agent sends the same key it uses for sensor data. Sets X-Agent-Sha256 on the response so the caller can verify integrity without a second round-trip.

members.member: Read `wwwroot/agent/version.txt` (one-line version string staged by CI). Falls back to "0.0.0" so the manifest stays valid even when the version file was not staged yet.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.GrafanaDatasources.JsonSource.JsonDatasourceController.TestConnection
member.summary: with 200 status code response. Used for "Test connection" on the datasource config page.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.GrafanaDatasources.JsonSource.JsonDatasourceController.GetMetrics(HSMServer.Controllers.GrafanaDatasources.JsonSource.MetricsRequest)
member.summary: to return available Products

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.GrafanaDatasources.JsonSource.JsonDatasourceController.GetOptions(HSMServer.Controllers.GrafanaDatasources.JsonSource.MetricPayloadOptionsRequest)
member.summary: to return a list of metric payload options (Sensors paths and data formats).

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.GrafanaDatasources.JsonSource.JsonDatasourceController.ReadHistory(HSMServer.Controllers.GrafanaDatasources.JsonSource.QueryHistoryRequest)
member.summary: to return panel data or annotations

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.ProductController.UpdateSensorGroups(HSMServer.Model.ViewModel.SensorGroupsRequest)
member.summary: Update which sensor groups agents under this product should collect (#1198).

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorHistoryController.NodeChartHistory(HSMServer.Model.Model.History.NodeChartRequest)
member.summary: Node-level overlay chart (issue #1235): returns the node's comparable child sensors as one line series each over the chosen window. Descendants are grouped by (type, unit); the operator picks which group with GroupKey (default: the largest), and within it the top MaxSensorsPerChart children by current value are charted. Read-only; children with no data in the window are omitted (drawn with gaps, never zero-filled).

member.name: T:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController
member.summary: Controller for receiving sensors data via https protocol. There is a default product for testing swagger methods.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.BoolSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of bool sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.IntSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of int sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.DoubleSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of double sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.StringSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of string sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.TimeSpanSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of timespan sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMServer.ApiObjectsConverters.VersionSensor)
member.summary: Receives value of version sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.RateSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of rate sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.EnumSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of enum sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.DoubleBarSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of double bar sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.IntBarSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives value of integer bar sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.FileSensorValue)
member.summary: Receives the value of file sensor, where the file contents are presented as byte array.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(System.Collections.Generic.List{HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorValueRequests.SensorValueBase})
member.summary: Accepts data in SensorValueBase format. Converts data to a typed format and saves it to the database. The key must be unique and stored in the header.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Get(HSMSensorDataObjects.HistoryRequests.HistoryRequest)
member.summary: Get history [from, to] or [from - count] for some sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Get(HSMSensorDataObjects.HistoryRequests.FileHistoryRequest)
member.summary: Get file (csv or txt) history [from, to] or [from - count] for some sensor

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(HSMSensorDataObjects.SensorRequests.AddOrUpdateSensorRequest)
member.summary: Add new sensor with selected properties or update sensor meta info

member.name: M:HSMServer.Controllers.SensorsController.Post(System.Collections.Generic.List{HSMSensorDataObjects.CommandRequestBase})
member.summary: List of sensor commands
member.returns: Dictionary that contains commands error. Key is path to sensor, Value is error

member.name: P:HSMServer.DTOs.AddOrUpdateSensorRequestDto.TtlAlert
member.summary: Backward compat: maps single TtlAlert to TtlAlerts list.

member.name: P:HSMServer.DTOs.AddOrUpdateSensorRequestDto.TTL
member.summary: Backward compat: maps single TTL to TTLs list.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Extensions.ColorExtensions.GetDefaultColor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get specified color in HTML format #RRGGBB for numbers from 0 to 8

member.name: M:HSMServer.Extensions.ColorExtensions.ArgbToHtml(System.Int32)
member.summary: return color in HTML format #RRGGBB

member.name: T:HSMServer.Filters.DataRequestHeaderSwaggerFilter
member.summary: Swagger filter for adding required string 'Key' in API requests header

member.name: T:HSMServer.Filters.ProductRoleFilters.ProductRoleFilterBySensorGroups
member.summary: Authorizes -bodied actions (toggling a product's sensor groups, #1198) against the role the user holds on the request's target product. Without this, any authenticated user could disable data collection on any product by POSTing its id.

member.name: T:HSMServer.Filters.SlackRoleFilters.SlackAdminAttribute
member.summary: Slack destinations are global (not folder-scoped), so any mutation requires administrator rights. Non-admins are redirected to Home/Index.

member.name: T:HSMServer.Filters.UserRoleFilterBase
member.summary: The attribute denies access to some actions for a user who is neither admin or has role from _roles

member.name: T:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentConnectionResolver
member.summary: Resolves the (address, port) the agent bundle's config.json points at. Prefers the admin-set external URL (the externally-reachable Sensor-API base; the server can't infer it behind Docker/NAT); when blank, falls back to the request host + the configured Sensor port. Pure (primitives only) so it is unit-tested without a web host.

member.name: T:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentBundleOptions
member.summary: Parameters baked into one per-product agent bundle. is the product's access-key GUID (string) the agent sends in the Key header. adds a topCpu block so the installed agent also reports the top processes by CPU (#1175).

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentBundleOptions.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Parameters baked into one per-product agent bundle. is the product's access-key GUID (string) the agent sends in the Key header. adds a topCpu block so the installed agent also reports the top processes by CPU (#1175).

member.name: T:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentInstallerBundle
member.summary: Builds the downloadable HSM Agent bundle (epic #1167, W7): a zip of the byte-identical signed hsm-agent.exe + a generated config.json (server address + key) + silent install/uninstall scripts. The exe is NEVER modified — all per-product data lives in config.json (Authenticode invariant). Install is 100% native C++ (the exe self-installs); no .NET/MSI on the client. Pure + side-effect-free so it is unit-tested without a web host.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentInstallerBundle.BuildConfigJson(HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentBundleOptions)
member.summary: The generated config.json — matches the agent's config schema (only address + key required).

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentInstallerBundle.BuildInstallScript
member.summary: Installer script: stops any running service, copies the exe, copies config on first install only (never overwrites a user-customised config), registers and starts the service. Requires Administrator (prints an error and pauses if not elevated).

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentInstallerBundle.BuildUninstallScript
member.summary: Uninstaller script: deregisters the service and removes the installed exe. Requires Administrator.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentInstallerBundle.BuildZip(System.Byte[],HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentBundleOptions)
member.summary: Assemble the zip in memory: the unmodified exe + generated config + install scripts.

member.name: T:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentKeySelector
member.summary: Picks the access key baked into a product's agent bundle. The agent registers its default sensors at start and streams values, so it needs add-node/add-sensor + send-data permissions — the product DefaultKey has all of them and never expires. Pure (Core types only) so it is unit-tested without a web host.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.Agent.AgentKeySelector.Select(HSMServer.Core.Model.ProductModel)
member.summary: Returns the best agent key for the product, or null when none actually satisfies . We never hand back an expired/under-permissioned key as a "last resort": it would bake a credential that fails to authenticate at runtime into the bundle with no signal to the admin. Null instead lets the caller refuse the download (BadRequest) so the admin fixes the key first.

member.name: T:HSMServer.Model.Model.History.NodeChartRequest
member.summary: Request for the node-level overlay chart (issue #1235): one node id plus the operator-chosen time window. The server groups the node's comparable descendants by (type, unit); GroupKey selects which group to chart (default: the largest).

member.name: P:HSMServer.Model.Model.History.NodeChartRequest.GroupKey
member.summary: Stable key of the comparable group to overlay (see NodeSensorGroup.Key). When null/unknown the server falls back to the largest comparable group.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.History.BarHistoryProcessor`1.AddValueFromLists(HSMServer.Model.History.SummaryBarItem{`0})
member.summary: Set fields, for which collecting lists of values is required

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.History.BarHistoryProcessor`1.ProcessItem(HSMCommon.Model.BarBaseValue{`0},HSMServer.Model.History.SummaryBarItem{`0},System.Boolean@)
member.summary: This method applies possible changes to the current data item for fields, for which collecting datas is not required
member.param: Current state of compression of summary

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.History.BarHistoryProcessor`1.CountMean(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{`0,System.Int32}})
member.summary: Count mean from the list of all means

members.member: Sensor groups currently disabled for this product's agents (#1198).
Sensor group names that should be disabled. All others are considered enabled. Valid values: "computer", "system", "disk", "network", "module", "process".

member.name: T:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModel.NodeSensorGroup
member.summary: A set of a node's descendant sensors that share the same sensor type and effective unit, and can therefore be overlaid on a single multi-line time chart (see issue #1235).

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModel.NodeSensorGroup.#ctor(HSMCommon.Model.SensorType,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Guid})
member.summary: A set of a node's descendant sensors that share the same sensor type and effective unit, and can therefore be overlaid on a single multi-line time chart (see issue #1235).

member.name: P:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModel.NodeSensorGroup.Key
member.summary: Stable identifier of the (type, unit) group — used by the client's group selector.

members.member: Sensor groups currently disabled for agents of this product (#1198).

member.name: P:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModel.SensorNodeViewModel.EffectiveUnitCode
member.summary: The unit that identifies this sensor's chart scale: the rate display unit for Rate sensors, otherwise the selected unit. Returned as the raw enum code (no reflection). Note this mixes two enums (RateDisplayUnit vs Unit), so it is only unambiguous when the sensor Type is also part of the key it is compared under (as in GetComparableChildGroups).

member.name: P:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModel.SensorNodeViewModel.EffectiveUnitLabel
member.summary: Display label for (e.g. "%", "MB/sec"), or empty. Must branch on the SAME source as : a Rate sensor without a DisplayUnit has code null, so its label is empty too — never the SelectedUnit, or two such sensors would share the null group key yet show different (conflicting) units.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModel.TreeViewModel.GetComparableChildGroups(System.Guid)
member.summary: Groups a node's chart-comparable descendant sensors by (type, effective unit) and returns the groups that contain at least two sensors, ordered from the largest group to the smallest. Drives the overlay endpoint; use for tab visibility.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModel.TreeViewModel.HasComparableChildGroup(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cheap existence check for the node "Chart" tab: returns true as soon as any (type, unit) group reaches two sensors. Runs on every node selection, so it avoids the labels/sort/allocation of .

member.name: P:HSMServer.Model.TreeViewModels.SelectedNodeViewModel.ShowChartTab
member.summary: True when the selected node has at least one group of >= 2 comparable child sensors to overlay on the node "Chart" tab (issue #1235). Set by the controller after the node is connected.

member.name: M:HSMServer.Notifications.SlackDestinationsManager.RemoveFolderFromChats(System.Guid,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Guid},HSMServer.Core.TableOfChanges.InitiatorInfo)
member.summary: Required by the IFolderManager.RemoveFolderFromChats contract so the same multicast delegate can fan out to Telegram and Slack. is unused here because Slack has no Telegram-style auto-remove at zero folders; it is only consumed by TelegramChatsManager.TryRemove for the audit trail.

member.name: T:HSMServer.ServerConfiguration.AgentConfig
member.summary: Settings for the downloadable HSM Agent (epic #1167). The externally-reachable Sensor-API base URL is baked into each per-product agent bundle so the client connects with zero configuration. The server cannot infer this behind Docker/NAT, so an admin sets it; when blank, the download endpoint falls back to the request host + the configured Sensor port.

member.name: P:HSMServer.ServerConfiguration.AgentConfig.AllowUntrustedCertificate
member.summary: Baked into downloaded bundles as server.allowUntrustedCertificate so an agent accepts a self-signed server certificate (the typical self-hosted / Docker eval case). Default false.

member.name: P:HSMServer.ServerConfiguration.AgentConfig.EnableTopCpuProcesses
member.summary: When true, downloaded bundles carry a topCpu block (issue #1175) so the installed agent also reports the top processes by CPU once a minute. The admin opts in here (server-side); the client agent has no UI and simply runs whatever config.json the bundle ships. Default false.

member.name: P:HSMServer.ServerConfiguration.AgentConfig.AutoUpdateEnabled
member.summary: Global kill-switch for the agent self-update channel (epic #1174). When false the GET /api/agent/version manifest returns updateEnabled: false and every agent that polls it will stay on its current version regardless of its local config. Default false (opt-in: enable when ready to roll out, disable to halt).
